message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 164 progress comment

RusticMaple: metrics.rs per-connection cx chain. handle_connection_
with_cx added (pre-flight + post-read cx.checkpoint), factored
shared body into handle_connection_impl. start_with_cx spawn at
L565 migrated — each per-conn task clones cx. Captured refactor
gotcha: owned TcpStream preserves inherent shutdown() resolution;
&mut drops to WriteExt trait with incompatible argcount.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
